title: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on rainbase pulls the trap tight, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight. The Straw Hats are trapped beneath Rain Dinners as Crocodile prepares to drown them and erase the kingdom’s last hope. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Com- Mander Chaka! The King is nowhere to be found!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: We've already searched the Royal Sleeping quarters, storehouse, balcony, palace grounds, and even the gardens!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Alabastan Capital, "Alubanna"

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Keep searching for his highness!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: He must be somewhere!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you sure his highness didn't just go for a walk outside late last night!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's impossible, sir! The guards stationed outside his room last night reported seeing no such thing!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And even if he left his room, we have guards stationed all over the city! One of them would have spotted his highness by now!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then tell me how could he have disappeared from his sleeping quarters!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Umm, well...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I want every inch of the Palace grounds and the city combed through!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Pell's usually the man for these kinds of jobs,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But he's currently busy scouting Rain Base...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If some- thing were to happen to his highness...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then to mobilize the army on my authority alone would not be seen kindly...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: curses! Where could his highness be at this critical time...?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Sir! W-we found his highness!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You found him!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Y-yes, but... Apparently, the reports say he...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Katorea, current base for the rebels

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Kouza! Wait for us too!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's the meaning of this!?

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Have you really sunk so low, cobra!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Trust in the king, Kouza.

summary: This part develops rainbase pulls the trap tight and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
